name: Kobo Clara Colour
introText: The Kobo Clara Colour is a 6-inch color E-ink e-reader with OverDrive library support and open ePub format for $159 CAD — the best e-reader under $200.
whatWorks: Color E-ink at $159 is the lowest price for color e-paper — the Clara Colour brings the same panel technology as the Libra Colour in a smaller, cheaper package.
Native library borrowing via OverDrive/Libby — full Canadian public library integration at the lowest price point of any e-reader with this feature.
worthKnowing: 16GB storage is adequate for most readers — average e-book is 1–3MB; 16GB holds thousands of books. Only users who store audiobooks locally will need more.
3-week battery is shorter than other options — smaller battery in the compact chassis means more frequent charging. A month of daily reading may require one or two charges.

commonComplaints.title: 3-week battery shorter than competitors
commonComplaints.body: The Clara Colour's 3-week battery vs. Libra Colour's 6 weeks means charging twice as often for heavy readers.

commonComplaints.title: 6-inch feels small for comics
commonComplaints.body: For manga and graphic novels, the 6-inch screen is cramped compared to the 7-inch Libra Colour. Text reading is fine at 6 inches.

commonComplaints.title: No physical page-turn buttons
commonComplaints.body: The Clara Colour is touchscreen-only. The Libra Colour has physical page-turn buttons — preferred by many e-reader users for one-handed reading.

verdict: The Kobo Clara Colour is the best e-reader under $200 — color E-ink, library support, and open ePub format at $159. For heavy readers who want physical page buttons, step up to the Kobo Libra Colour at $60 more. For casual readers and library users, the Clara Colour is all you need.

realBuyers.quote: Bought it to use my library card. Have read 40 free books in 3 months. Best $159 I've ever spent.
Perfect size for commuting. Fits in a jacket pocket. Battery lasts 3 weeks so I never stress about charging.
Color is nice for book covers. Text reading is excellent. Great starter e-reader.

sources.title: Kobo Clara Colour Review — The Verge

metaDescription: Kobo Clara Colour review Canada: 6" color E-ink 300 PPI, OverDrive support, IPX8. $159 CAD. Best budget e-reader under $200 for Canadians.
